data.name: Are There Bunny Girls in the Corner Store?
data.detailed_description:
Are There Bunny Girls in the Corner Store?

Genre: Visual Novel / Card Battler / Slice of Life Setting: A modern city where customer service just got a whole lot cuter.

Welcome to Bunny Mart!

Bunny girls are running the new local shop, and business is booming! Can you charm your way into their hearts before the rest of the town does?

The grand opening of "Bunny Mart" has turned your quiet town upside down. The snacks are cheap, the drinks are cold, but let's be honest everyone is here for the clerks.

You aren't the only one trying to get their attention. The shop is packed! If you want to stand out from the crowd, you can’t just talk the talk. You’ll need to play your cards right.

Gameplay

Are There Bunny Girls in the Corner Store? mixes classic Visual Novel storytelling with a casual card battler.

  • Explore the Town: Use the city map to navigate your day. Will you head to the park to clear your head, or rush straight to the store to catch a specific girl on her shift?

  • Card-Based Charm: Dialogue choices only go so far! Engage the girls in simple but strategic card games to win their attention. Build your stats, play the winning hand, and unlock special events.

  • Beat the Competition: The town is flocking to the shop. You need to prove you’re not just another customer you’re the Regular they’ve been waiting for.

Meet the Staff

  • 🐰 Akari (The Genki Girl): The bubbly front-desk face of the store. She believes a smile can fix anything. Can you match her high energy?

  • 🐰 Mina (The Gamer): Quiet, tech-savvy, and more comfortable with gadgets than customers. She might ignore your texts, but she’ll never turn down a game challenge.

  • 🐰 Sakura (The Dreamer): A romantic soul who sees poetry in stocking shelves. She wants a fairytale romance—don't disappoint her.

  • 🐰 Luna (The Boss): The sharp-tongued manager with a heart of gold (buried very, very deep). She runs a tight ship. winning her over is the ultimate boss battle.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7, 8, 10, 11
  • 處理器: Dual Core or better
  • 記憶體: 200 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Nvidia GT 750 or better, AMD equivalent
  • 儲存空間: 200 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: 10.6 or higher
  • 處理器: Dual Core or better
  • 記憶體: 200 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Nvidia GT 750 or better, AMD equivalent
